value: Unfortunately, the standard messaging app doesn't display which phone number initiated a group text—you'll only see the list of participants. Your best bet would be to reach out to the person directly through another channel (a call, email, or social media) to ask for their number, or if you recognize any of the other group members, you could ask them. If you're looking for a workaround, some third-party messaging apps offer more detailed conversation metadata, though that would require switching platforms. Let me know if you'd like suggestions for alternatives!
